items.name_en: 。!!️《Includes Full Original Green Box Packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching red and green webbing strap combine to offer more styling possibilities for this light green patent leather Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag. Light green patent leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, Inside: 1 zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, Handle (18cm high) Removable webbing shoulder strap (52cm high) Hook closure, Weight: approx. 0.4kg.

The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching strap with red and green stripes combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag made from the brand's classic brown Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, inside: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, top handle (18cm high), detachable webbing shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
Model: 782849.
Dimensions: 27.5(W) x 19(H) x 4cm(D)
Color: Brown/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, Long wallet, and Lipstick

items.name_en: .🌷【New】GG Kids Animal Print Tote. The 2024 Early Spring Kids collection artfully blends circular interlocking GG and playful frog embroidery, playfully interpreting tailoring style. New apparel pieces and accessories are presented in different colors and materials, playfully highlighting the brand's narrative of childlike innocence. This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with the Gucci animal print, cleverly incorporating white contrast trim. White and beige Supreme canvas, white Supreme canvas trim, Gucci animal print by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open interior pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.
